case_title: BUCK, EDWARD G. VS MADRID, LEONARD J.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUCK, EDWARD G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MADRID, LEONARD J. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MADRID, LEONARD J.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MADRID, LEONARD J.
NO NAME GIVEN ON PARTY SERVED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BUCK, EDWARD G. AS TO DEFENDANT MADRID, LEONARD J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
